en_title: 'The DNA at Obsidian Is the Same as It Always Was' — Obsidian Director Blasts People 'Running Their Mouths' About How the Studio Has Changed
cn_title: XBOX裁员后黑曜石总监：工作室的DNA始终未变
subtitle: 流言止于事实
opus_summary: 黑曜石总监Brandon Adler反驳XBOX裁员后关于工作室变化的批评，称核心主创仍在岗，工作室DNA与过去一脉相承。与此同时，黑曜石据报取消《宣誓》续作，并启动新的《辐射》项目。

paragraphs.en: Obsidian Entertainment director Brandon Adler is tired of seeing "cold take artists" who are "running their mouths" about how the studio has changed following recent Xbox layoffs.
paragraphs.cn: 黑曜石娱乐总监Brandon Adler厌倦了看到「冷评艺术家」在近期XBOX裁员后对工作室变化「信口开河」。

paragraphs.en: "Another difficult aspect is having to see a bunch of cold take artists coming out of the woodwork to talk about what Obsidian is or what it isn't," Adler said. "The number of times I've seen people, with no understanding of who has worked on our previous games or what they contributed, talk about how Obsidian isn't who they used to be... is staggering. Most of the time they are not just wrong, but spreading an enormous amount of misinformation."
paragraphs.cn: Adler说：「另一个难受之处，是不得不看到一群冷评艺术家突然冒出来，谈论黑曜石是什么、又不是什么。我见过太多人根本不了解谁参与过我们过去的游戏、他们贡献了什么，却在那里说黑曜石已经不是从前的黑曜石了……次数多得惊人。他们大多数时候不仅是错的，还在传播大量错误信息。」

paragraphs.en: Obsidian was one included in the laundry list of Xbox game developers caught in the line of fire when Microsoft announced last week. At the time, Xbox CEO Asha Sharma described the cuts as "the most significant restructure" the gaming company has ever seen, resulting in 1,600 staff losing their jobs immediately, while another 1,600 are still yet to come throughout the financial year.
paragraphs.cn: 微软上周宣布裁员时，黑曜石也被列入遭到波及的XBOX开发商名单。当时，XBOX首席执行官Asha Sharma称这是这家游戏公司经历过的「最重大重组」，导致1,600名员工立即失业，整个财年还将有另外1,600人失去工作。

paragraphs.en: It's a restructure that saw studios Ninja Theory and Undead Labs enter terms with new ownership as Double Fine and Compulsion Games became independent. While the fate of Marvel's Blade developer Arkane Studios remains unclear , developers like ZeniMax Online , id Software , and Obsidian are said to have lost large chunks of their teams.
paragraphs.cn: 这次重组让Ninja Theory和Undead Labs与新东家展开安排，同时Double Fine和Compulsion Games成为独立工作室。虽然《漫威刀锋战士》开发商Arkane Studios的命运仍不明朗，但据称ZeniMax Online、id Software和黑曜石都失去了大批团队成员。

paragraphs.en: Amid uncertainty across Xbox, Adler is fighting back against those misrepresenting the talent Obsidian has gathered over the years. He said that, in many cases, "the people in lead or director roles are the same people that worked on games like The Outer Worlds, Pillars of Eternity, and New Vegas."
paragraphs.cn: 在XBOX一片不确定性中，Adler反击了那些歪曲黑曜石多年积累人才的人。他说，在很多情况下，「担任领导或总监职位的人，正是参与过《天外世界》《永恒之柱》和《新维加斯》等游戏的人」。

paragraphs.en: "Like, literally the same people," he added. "The through line from KotOR2 to our current games is pretty clear.
paragraphs.cn: 他补充道：「真的就是同一批人。从《旧共和国武士2》到我们当前的游戏，传承脉络非常清晰。」

paragraphs.en: "Is Obsidian the same as it was 20 years ago? No, of course not. Nothing stays the same. But the DNA at Obsidian is the same as it always was. The same DNA that created KotOR, New Vegas, NWN2, and Stick of Truth.
paragraphs.cn: 「黑曜石和20年前一样吗？当然不是。没有什么会永远不变。但黑曜石的DNA始终如一。正是同样的DNA创造了《旧共和国武士》《新维加斯》《无冬之夜2》和《南方公园：真理之杖》。

paragraphs.en: "I'm extremely proud of our history and I am also excited for who we have become."
paragraphs.cn: 「我为我们的历史感到无比自豪，也对我们如今的面貌感到兴奋。」

paragraphs.en: Adler signed off, asking readers to remember that "people spouting off about Obsidian, running their mouths about who we are now vs. what we were then" are individuals who have "zero insight into how a game is made and who contributed to our previous games." Meanwhile, in the aftermath of last week's layoffs, Bloomberg reported that Obsidian recently canceled a sequel for its fantasy RPG, Avowed, and started work on a return to the Fallout universe with a new game led by Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer.
paragraphs.cn: Adler最后提醒读者，那些「大肆谈论黑曜石，对我们现在与过去说三道四」的人，「完全不了解游戏是如何制作的，也不了解谁参与了我们过去的游戏」。与此同时，彭博社报道，黑曜石近期取消了奇幻RPG《宣誓》的续作，并开始制作一款回归《辐射》宇宙的新游戏，由《辐射：新维加斯》总监Josh Sawyer领衔。

paragraphs.en: You can catch up on some of the other post-layoff news that has emerged here . For a look at what's going on at Bethesda, you can click here .
paragraphs.cn: 你可以在这里了解其他裁员后出现的新闻；想了解贝塞斯达的近况，则可以点击这里。
